title: The Cyber Bazaar
description: An overlay market boots up at the edge of the network. Brokers only deal in summer, and they only respect couriers who already proved themselves at the wandering merchant's cart.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Discover the bazaar overlay near the nexus
Brokers only trade in summer (visit while season=summer)
Carry a merchant-token from a previous run
Reach affinity 25 with the shop merchant first
Reach level 4 - bazaar bouncers turn rookies away
Already have a shrine-token from the silicon shrine

broker_friend.text: The lead broker pulls aside the curtain and gifts you the encrypted ledger. "For the courier with steady hands - we will remember this."

smuggler.text: You walk out with the ledger under your jacket. The neon flickers. Three brokers note your face on three separate slates.

fair_buyer.text: You pay in shrine-tokens and walk away with the ledger. The bazaar dissolves at sunset.
